mapper.select: SELECT la.application_id AS applicationId, la.user_id AS userId, su.real_name AS userName, su.phone AS userPhone, lp.product_name AS productName, la.apply_amount AS applyAmount, la.apply_term AS applyTerm, la.credit_score AS creditScore, la.apply_time AS applyTime FROM loan_application la LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON la.user_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN loan_product lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.application_status = 'pending' ORDER BY la.apply_time ASC
